articles.title: Milan is taking part in the "Amici dei Bambini" event today: Bartesaghi present. With him the Inter player Bartesaghi
articles.summary: On Monday 9 March 2026 at the Carro Social Club in via Granelli n.1 in Sesto San Giovanni, Davide Bartesaghi and Yann Aurel Bisseck will receive the "Friend of Children" Award.

articles.title: A note in Doveri's report is the only negative note of the derby for Milan
articles.summary: The only negative note of the derby won yesterday by Milan comes from the referee Doveri's report.

articles.title: Victory in the derby and day of rest: Milan are not training today. Shooting tomorrow
articles.summary: After yesterday's derby victory against Inter, Massimiliano Allegri gave his players a day of rest: today, therefore, there will be no training at Milanello. The sessions will resume tomorrow.

articles.title: Milan, the next match: it will be another big match after all the rivals
articles.summary: After the victory in the derby, Milan will host Lazio on Sunday: kick-off at the Olimpico set for 8.45pm.

articles.title: Serie A, the 28th matchday ends tonight with the postponement of Monday
articles.summary:
Below is the program for the 28th matchday of Serie A:

03/07/2026 Saturday 15.

articles.title: Inter, there is no disallowed goal. Duties whistles clearly, several times, before the ball goes in
articles.summary: At the end of the match Inter "scored" from a corner, with Carlos Augusto deflecting Dimarco's cross from a few steps away and scoring. But it doesn't apply, in fact, it doesn't exist at all.

articles.title: Ambrosini: "Let's not underestimate the psychological aspect. Inter lost the last two championships in the sprint against Napoli and Milan"
articles.summary:
Milan wins the Derby, and the question is automatic: championship reopened? Massimo Ambrosini, in the DAZN studios, talks about it like this:

“Let's not underestimate the psychological aspect.

articles.title: MN - Cardinale in the locker room after the derby won. Congratulations to the team and beyond
articles.summary: As announced yesterday, Gerry Cardinale was at San Siro this evening to watch live the derby between Milan and Inter, won by the Rossoneri thanks to Estupinan's beautiful goal in the first half.
